header.bottom: Clearly the best renovation company in the market.

contact.text: Looking to give your home a fresh new look? Trust KP BAT for all your renovation needs. Our experienced team offers services ranging from simple painting updates to full-scale renovations, ensuring your vision comes to life with quality and precision.

top.desc: Thoughtfully designed spaces where every detail works in harmony
top.title: Make your home a style gallery

bottom.desc: Experience beauty in every detail of your renewed space

about-old.name: Who are we?
about-old.line1: Are you looking to renovate your interior to give a new life to your house or apartment? Trust KP BAT.
about-old.line2: We provide you with a team of qualified and experienced professionals to carry out all your renovation projects, from simple painting refreshes to complete renovations.
about-old.line3: We offer a wide range of services to meet all your needs: painting, flooring, plumbing, electricity, carpentry, kitchen and bathroom design, etc.
about-old.line4: We work with high-quality materials to ensure a durable and aesthetic result. We listen to your needs and expectations to offer you a tailor-made service that is adapted to your budget and constraints.

middle.text: Give a new life to your house or apartment with our skilled team. KP BAT supports you in all your renovation projects: painting, electricity, plumbing, carpentry, custom kitchens and bathrooms.

our-services.title: Explore Our Expert Services
our-services.desc: We provide services and products that set high standards for quality, reliability, and durability, ensuring long-term value and exceptional performance in every detail.

electricity.title: Electricity
electricity.description:
Are you looking for a professional to bring your electrical installation up to standard? Trust our company for all general electrical work in your house or apartment. We work on both new builds and renovations:
- Design and installation of new electrical systems
- Renovation of existing electrical installations
- Compliance upgrades
- Electrical maintenance and troubleshooting
- Commissioning of VMC systems and intercoms

plumbing.title: Plumbing/Heating
plumbing.description: We supply and install plumbing and sanitary equipment for both private and professional use. At the same time, we take care of delivering and installing your boilers, water heaters, and radiators.

insulation.title: Interior/Exterior
insulation.description:
We carry out wall insulation work from the inside, which involves adding insulation (glass wool, rock wool, cork, hemp) inside the house.
We also handle exterior wall insulation by installing insulating panels on the entire outer surface of the house. These include synthetic (plastic) insulators, natural ones (plant- or animal-based like sheep's wool), and mineral types like glass wool.

masonry.title: Masonry
masonry.description: We specialize in artisan masonry, wall openings, reinforcement, slabs and screeds, demolition, stonework, load-bearing walls, foundations, roofing, structural openings, and carpentry. Our offer also includes consultations with an engineer.

flooring.title: Flooring
flooring.description: Our team takes great care of your flooring. Whether it’s tiling, parquet, linoleum, PVC flooring, carpet, or polished concrete, we ensure proper surface preparation, material compatibility, and workmanship quality.

windows.title: Windows
windows.description:
Windows play a key role and are an essential element of your home. All our windows are fully customizable (colours, shapes, opening directions). They blend seamlessly with your façade and contribute to the harmony of your home.

Whether in PVC, wood, aluminium, or wood-aluminium, you can choose from many styles, options, and accessories. Opt for practical roller shutters to improve comfort, increase energy savings, and enhance security.

gallery-sec.description: Browse our gallery, and see why we're worthy of your trust!

services.description: We provide services and products that set high standards for quality, reliability, durability.

electricity.title: Electricity
electricity.description:
Vous recherchez un professionnel pour une mise aux normes électrique ? Faites de notre
entreprise pour les travaux d’électricité générale de votre maison ou de votre appartement.
Nous intervenons en neuf comme en rénovation :
Conception et installation électrique neuve
Rénovation de l’électricité de votre habitation
Mise en conformité des installations électriques
Entretien et dépannage en électricité
Mise en service de VMC, Interphone

plumbing.title: Plumbing/Heating
plumbing.description:
S'occupe de vous fournir et de venir installer votre plomberie et vos sanitaires
que ce soit pour un usage privatif ou professionnel, en même temps s'occupe
de vous fournir et de venir installer vos chaudières, chauffe-eaux et radiateurs.

insulation.title: Interior/Exterior
insulation.description:
Effectue vos travaux d’isolation des murs par l’intérieur. Cette technique
consiste à ajouter de l’isolant (laine de verre, de roche, de liège, chanvre) à
l’intérieur de la maison.
Nous intervenons également dans l’isolation des murs par l’extérieur. Cela
consiste à installer des panneaux isolants à l’extérieur de l’ensemble de la
maison. les isolants synthétiques (en plastique), les isolants naturels (produits
végétaux ou animaux, comme la laine de mouton) et les isolants minéraux,
comme la laine de verre.

masonry.title: Masonry
masonry.description:
Nous nous spécialisons dans Artisan maçon, Ouverture, Renforcement, Dalles
et chapes, Démolition, Travail de la pierre, Murs porteurs, Fondations,
Couverture, Ouvertures de murs, Charpente. Notre offre comprend également
des consultations avec l'Ingénieur

flooring.title: Flooring
flooring.description:
Notre équipe prendra soin de votre sol. On peut parler de carrelage, parquet,
sol lino, sol PVC, Moquette, Béton Cire... Nous veillerons à la bonne
préparation des surfaces, à l'adéquation du matériau, au respect

windows.title: Windows
windows.description:
La fenêtre joue un rôle essentiel et est un en élément clé de votre habitation. Toutes nos
fenêtres, sont personnalisables (couleurs, formes, sens d'ouvertures). Votre fenêtre s’intègre
à votre façade et contribue à l'harmonie de votre habitation.

Que ce soit sur PVC, Bois, Aluminium ou Bois-Alu, vous pouvez choisir parmi de nombreux
styles, options et accessoires. Succombez également à la praticité du volet roulant, réalisez
de belles économies d’énergie, gagnez en confort et sécurité.
